title: Unique Party 99206 - 9oz Neon Yellow Paper Cups, Pack of 14
features: THE BEST THEME: Ready to build an amazing party? Let these tableware and accesories make a good impression! Your guests will love keeping their beverages on these tablewares.
PERFECT FOR ANY OCASSION: This is ideal for baby shower decorations, birthdays, summer parties, indoor or outdoor family reunions.
SAFE AND ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY: These are made of environmentally friendly biodegradable material.
GREAT ADD ON: Combine these with other party supplies or mix with printed and other solid tableware to personalize your party table and party. You can celebrate with a bang!
HIGH QUALITY: These are thick and rigid made of colored paper and won't fold while carrying beverage so you don't have to worry about spills and mess.
